channel.title: Craft on The Beige Journal
channel.description: Recent content in Craft on The Beige Journal

item.title: Best punch needle kits for beginners
item.description:
Are you ready to dive into the colorful and creative world of punch needle embroidery? Whether you’re a seasoned crafter looking for your next project or a newbie eager to pick up a new hobby, you’re in for a treat! Today, I’m thrilled to share with you a handpicked compilation of punch needle kits that are perfect for beginners and delightful for experienced needle artists alike.

Punch needle embroidery, with its rich textures and vibrant colors, is not just a crafting trend; it’s a relaxing and rewarding way to create beautiful art pieces that add a personal touch to your home or make for thoughtful, handmade gifts. From charming plant patterns to cozy pillowcases, and from bold tiger designs to delicate floral motifs, these kits offer something for everyone.

item.title: How to make a digital planner template in Canva and Keynote
item.description:
Want to make your own digital planner or sell one?

Making a template for your future planners will make things a lot easier!

Learn now to make your own digital planner template using Canva and Keynote!

Watch along on Youtube!

Instagram // Youtube // Etsy Shop

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aXkVjMOTyIk&ab_channel=createwithmny

item.title: DIY black and white cards for baby tummy time - Free printable
item.description:
Tummy time is an important part of a baby’s daily routine. It helps them strengthen their neck muscle and get some exercise between naps!

Download these cute black and white contrast cards to entertain your baby during tummy time!

How to use

  1. Download the files below
  2. Print files on cardstock paper
  3. Cut the page in half
  4. Fold between the image, and use it to stand up the cards!

Loading…
